sourceRom: rom/宝可梦 激进红4.1 全汉化by兔砸博士.gba
notes: Profile generated from Radical Red 4.1 CN ROM byte evidence. Built-in dex/map resources, verified live and save editing, live/save party and box import, and live/save trainer writes are enabled from current-ROM/sample evidence. Experiments remain disabled until independent round trips.

romVerified: base stats table at 0x17B98EC, 28 bytes each, 1377 slots; pointer literal hit count 56
complete species name table at 0x14042CC, 11 bytes each, ids 0..1375; current visual/live samples plus current token map provide 1349 display names; 27 zero-stat slots are marked unused
move data table at 0x11521D0, 12 bytes each, 1004 slots; pointer literal hit count 428
move effect byte is current-ROM move record byte +0; move_effects.tsv has 211 used effect ids and ROM-derived representative descriptions
move name table at 0x10F3188, 13 bytes each; current token map provides 1003 display names
move description pointer table at 0x103DF74; indexed by move id - 1; current ROM provides 1003 fully decoded move descriptions and preserves all raw pointer bytes
machine move table at 0x18224B8 and tutor move table at 0x18223B8, each with 128 u16 entries; both immediately follow the current national-dex resource block
machine compatibility table at 0x13E6DB4 and tutor compatibility table at 0x13EC404; each has 1381 16-byte species rows and current-ROM bit-test function references
item data table at 0x13C0000, 44 bytes each, 750 slots; pointer literal hit count 19
item description pointers are item record offset +20; current ROM provides 750 fully decoded item descriptions and preserves all raw pointer bytes

active expanded evolution table at 0x17CD9B0, 16 8-byte slots across 1381 species rows; species_evolutions_raw.tsv preserves 735 records and the UI-derived table keeps 664 after excluding method-254 parameter-0 battle-form reversion edges
active level-up move pointer table at 0x180175C, ids 0..1375; records are {u16 move,u8 level} terminated by 00 00 FF and 1349 species have entries
expanded egg-move stream at 0x17CB0E4..0x17CD44A; markers are 20000+species and provide 4085 move records for 444 species
ability name table at 0x10E32C0, 17 bytes each, ids 0..255; current token map provides 255 display names
ability description pointer table at 0x1009B84; all 256 current-ROM rows decode completely and preserve pointers/raw bytes
experience table bytes at 0x253AE4; ROM stores levels 0..100 for six growth rates
item_pockets.tsv and 130 item hold-effect rows are derived from Radical Red item table bytes; effect labels use representative current-ROM item names/descriptions
national dex table at 0x18218F0, indexed by species-1; current-ROM pointers occur at 0x4323C, 0x432B0, and 0x13F1B84
map group table at 0x3526A8, 43 groups; current-ROM function 0x08055238 indexes it; extracted 437 maps and 1412 warps
wild encounter header table at 0x72C984, 142 20-byte headers terminated by FF FF; extracted 2338 current-ROM land/water/rock/fishing slots for 419 species
front sprites extracted from table 0x17FA1C4 and palettes from 0x1811208; visual samples verified species 1/4/7/25/456/666
pokemon icons extracted from table 0x17FE6CC; 0x420-byte records contain two 32x32 4bpp frames plus a 32-byte palette; visual samples verified species 1/25/456/666
egg resources verified at species slot 412: zero base stats, a 64x64 egg front sprite, and a matching 32x32 egg menu icon from the current ROM tables
live box base table at 0x1148930 contains 25 EWRAM addresses; current-ROM accessors use 30 slots of 58 bytes per box; live edit and delete round trips are documented separately

save section descriptor table at 0x1148BF0 proves SaveBlock2/SaveBlock1/PC offsets and lengths; current-ROM save code at 0x090B8B80 maps the 0x2EA4-byte CFRU extension through sections 0/4/13 and sectors 30/31

jijin hong.sav save-as and in-place-with-backup round trips reopen with 14/14 sections and verify party, all five bag pockets, boxes 1/20/22/23/24/25, trainer name/money, deletion, empty-slot box import, and a profile-derived level-5 party append
matching-ROM live round trips verify a profile-derived level-5 party append with complete record/count restore and trainer name/money temporary writes with complete byte restore
displayHints: species.tsv uses the complete Radical Red species-name raw table, current visual/live samples, and current token-map decodes only; zero-stat rows are marked 未使用; unresolved non-empty rows remain placeholders
move_rom_names.tsv uses current token-map decodes only; unresolved rows remain placeholders

move_rom_names.tsv preserves the direct current-ROM name decode; moves.tsv adds 177 display-only disambiguations for unused, Z, Dynamax/Gigantamax, and Laser Focus slots using current-ROM type/category/description bytes plus the aligned Radical Red 4.1 internal-id hint

move_descriptions.tsv uses the current Radical Red move-description pointer table and complete current token-map decodes only; incomplete rows are left blank while raw bytes remain in move_description_bytes.tsv
items.tsv uses current Radical Red sample evidence, machine-name token patterns from current raw bytes, and complete current token-map decodes only; unresolved rows remain placeholders
item_descriptions.tsv uses current item-record description pointers and complete current token-map decodes only; incomplete rows are left blank while raw bytes remain in item_description_bytes.tsv

tools/radical_red_ability_name_hints.tsv aligns the Radical Red Dex ability order with 52poke official Chinese ability names; it is display-hint evidence only and is used only when the current ROM fixed-width ability-name row decodes cleanly under the learned token map

tools/radical_red_species_name_candidates.tsv and tools/radical_red_item_name_hints.tsv use PokeAPI zh-Hans names as display-only candidate text; species order is not assumed, and a candidate is used only when the current ROM raw row has a unique, conflict-free token match
abilities.tsv uses the Radical Red ability-name raw table and complete current token-map decodes only; unresolved or conflicting rows remain placeholders
ability_descriptions.tsv contains complete current-ROM text-map decodes while pointer/raw tables preserve the source bytes
ability_description_decoding.tsv preserves complete decode diagnostics for regression checks
game_text_chars.tsv is learned from current Radical Red byte tables plus documented display-name alignment hints; it is display-only
experience.tsv repeats level-100 values for levels 101..150 only to satisfy the current UI table shape; profile maxLevel is 100

species_forms.tsv groups duplicate current-ROM national-dex numbers; semantic suffixes come from the Radical Red 4.1 internal-id export hint in tools/radical_red_41_internal_species_names_en.txt and are cross-checked against current-ROM stats, special evolution targets, and item parameters; 334 rows have semantic labels
map section name table at 0x3F1CAC supplies rows 0..108; current-ROM lookup code rejects ids above 108, so 84 used expanded ids intentionally use neutral labels
disabledOrPlaceholder: expanded map ids above 108 have no name pointer in the active current-ROM lookup path; neutral labels are retained without guessing
live and save bag use independently verified current-ROM CFRU mappings; important-item edits can still affect game progression
live and save party/box writes plus empty-slot dex import are verified
live trainer name/money writers are verified; battle-assist timer writers remain disabled until reversible matching-ROM battle validation

populated current-ROM sample has 14/14 latest sections; party, bag, boxes, trainer, save-as, in-place backup, and empty-slot saved-box/saved-party import round trips are recorded in RADICAL_RED_REVERSE_NOTES.md
